name: Sea Bikers Jetski
short_description: An indie jet ski racing arcade game made for pure fun on the water. 16 tracks across 4 environments: Mediterranean, Caribbean, Baltic, and Pacific. Fire missiles, drop mines, boost, jump, and dodge. Steam Achievements and online leaderboards included. No microtransactions, no subscriptions.
detailed_description:
An indie jet ski racing arcade game made for pure fun on the water.

16 tracks across 4 environments: Mediterranean, Caribbean, Baltic, and Pacific.

Fire missiles, drop mines, boost, jump, and dodge.

Steam Achievements and online leaderboards included.

No microtransactions, no subscriptions.

---

Online mode: This mode is a modest peer-to-peer mode, with no dedicated server (one player is the host). Quality depends on the players' computers and internet connection. Therefore, it has been decided not to include it as an official feature of the game, which is listed on Steam as single-player.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
